title: The Heart of a Siren
writer: Fanny Hatton, Frederic Hatton, Arthur Hoerl
actors: Barbara La Marr, Conway Tearle, Harry T. Morey
plot: Heart of a Siren is a 1925 silent film drama/romance directed by Phil Rosen and distributed by First National Pictures. Barbara La Marr is the star of the picture which is a surviving film and one of La Marr's final movies. The copy
